prompt: Create a luminous vertical anime illustration of a graceful young woman sitting in profile on the wooden veranda of a traditional Japanese house on a snowy winter night. She wears an elegant white-and-deep-purple floral kimono with long flowing sleeves, a dark obi, purple flower ornaments, dangling tassels, and a large purple butterfly hair accessory; her very long silver-white hair with lavender tips cascades down her back. Place a flat opaque pale lavender square over the center of her face, like an intentional censor block, hiding her facial features. She raises one delicate hand toward a glowing butterfly while looking outward into the night. The setting is a serene Japanese garden covered in snow, with a small warmly lit shrine or pavilion in the background, dark pine silhouettes, a bright frosty tree with sparkling white branches behind her, and a shoji door frame on the right. Include exactly 10 butterfly elements: 1 purple butterfly hair ornament on her head, 1 larger glowing butterfly near her raised fingertips, 4 small glowing butterflies in the left sky, 1 bright butterfly on her lap, 1 bright butterfly near the lower-left hem, and 2 glowing butterflies near the lower-right veranda. Use dreamy moonlit blue lighting, violet highlights, soft bokeh snow sparkles, delicate rim light around the hair, highly detailed kimono fabric, romantic fantasy atmosphere, polished gpt-image-2 anime key visual style, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark.
